strings.panel.p1.narration.1.html: The player fears nothing as he steers Radd through the perils of his game.
strings.panel.p2.narration.1.html: After all, it's Radd who has to suffer, not the player.
strings.panel.p3.narration.1.html: The player feels all the excitement of the adventure, while Radd feels all the pain.
